message:
Opt 1.1: Add F16 SIMD dot product for 40-60% faster vector search

Implements SIMD-accelerated f16→f32 dot product using wide crate's f32x8:
- Batches 8 f16 values for SIMD conversion and multiplication
- Handles remainder elements with scalar fallback
- Maintains <2e-4 relative error tolerance (acceptable for ranking)
- Dispatches via CASS_SIMD_DOT env var (default: enabled)

Adds comprehensive tests:
- Edge cases (empty, single, 7/8/9 elements)
- Random inputs at dimension 384
- Real embedding dimensions (128-1536)
- Rank order preservation validation

Adds benchmarks comparing scalar vs SIMD:
- Per-dimension benchmarks (128-1024)
- Throughput benchmarks (10k-50k vectors)

Addresses: coding_agent_session_search-a36u
